stemHtml: When an aircraft is parked on stand, how are the wheel brakes kept applied in parking configuration?

options.a: A mechanical linkage keeps the brake pads pressed on the discs.
options.b: The accumulator or parking brake valve traps hydraulic pressure in the brake lines.
options.c: The brakes rely on residual pressure in the pedal master cylinder.
options.d: Electrical actuators hold the brakes applied as long as battery power is available.
